entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An important cereal crop cultivated by smallholder farmers in Mali contributing to food security

entities.name: FERTILIZATION MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies combining organic and inorganic fertilizer applications to evaluate impacts on productivity and profitability

entities.name: ORGANIC FERTILIZER
entities.description: A type of fertilizer used as part of fertilization management strategies

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZER
entities.description: A type of fertilizer used as part of fertilization management strategies

entities.description: The measure of grain production per unit area, affected by fertilization and variety

entities.name: STALK YIELD

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output efficiency

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
